payload.title: METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION AUTHORITY November Financial Plan - 2023 November Forecast Accrual Statement of Operations by Category December 2023

Farebox Revenue Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT was unfavorable by ($39.2M) mainly due to lower Bus ridership. These results were partially offset by favorable variances of $19.6M at MNR and $3.3M at the LIRR, mainly due to higher ridership, and $0.5M at MTA Bus, mainly due to higher yields.

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue was unfavorable by ($16.2M) or (0.3%) for December 2023 YTD. NYCT was unfavorable by ($39.2M) mainly due to lower Bus ridership. This was partially offset by favorable variances of $19.6M at MNR, $3.3M at LIRR mainly due to higher ridership, and $0.5M at MTA Bus mainly due to higher yields.
payload.subject: MTA Farebox Revenue YTD December 2023

tool_args.label: Subsidies Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: The unfavorable variance mainly reflected unfavorable MTA Bus Subsidy results of $92.9M, due to timing, MRT of $22.3M due to lower-than-expected mortgage activity, and lower Urban Tax of $22.2M due to lower-than-expected commercial real estate activity in NYC.

payload.claim_text: Subsidies were unfavorable by ($119.3M) or (1.3%) for December 2023 YTD, mainly reflecting unfavorable MTA Bus Subsidy results of $92.9M due to timing, MRT of $22.3M due to lower-than-expected mortgage activity, and lower Urban Tax of $22.2M due to lower-than-expected commercial real estate activity in NYC.
payload.subject: MTA Total Subsidies YTD December 2023

tool_args.label: Payroll Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: MTA HQ was favorable by $35.0M mainly due to vacancies, and the timing of payment of vacation accruals and retroactive pay. The LIRR was favorable by $20.0M mainly due to the timing of a one-time essential worker payment and vacancies.

payload.claim_text: Payroll (Non-Reimbursable) was favorable by $123.9M or 2.1% for December 2023 YTD. MTA HQ was favorable by $35.0M mainly due to vacancies and timing of payment of vacation accruals and retroactive pay. The LIRR was favorable by $20.0M mainly due to the timing of a one-time essential worker payment and vacancies.
payload.subject: MTA Payroll YTD December 2023

tool_args.label: Overtime Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Unfavorable outcomes resulting from overruns totaling ($16.8M) at NYCT, ($11.3M) at MNR, ($1.6M) at B&T, and ($0.8M) at MTA HQ were mainly due to higher vacancy/absentee coverage requirements.

payload.claim_text: Overtime (Non-Reimbursable) was unfavorable by ($17.8M) or (1.6%) for December 2023 YTD due to overruns at NYCT ($16.8M), MNR ($11.3M), B&T ($1.6M), and MTA HQ ($0.8M) mainly due to higher vacancy/absentee coverage requirements. Partially offset by favorable outcomes of $9.5M at MTA Bus due to lower scheduled and unscheduled service.
payload.subject: MTA Overtime YTD December 2023

tool_args.label: TWU Local 100 Settlement Note
tool_args.raw_text: The Mid-Year Forecast for Payroll does not reflect a projected $135 million expense related to the TWU Local 100 settlement, which was below-the-line in the 2023 July Plan.

payload.claim_text: The Mid-Year Forecast for Payroll does not reflect a projected $135 million expense related to the TWU Local 100 settlement, which was below-the-line in the 2023 July Plan.
payload.subject: MTA Payroll Forecast

tool_args.label: Preliminary Close Note
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet reflected in current month actuals; will be captured in YTD results.

tool_args.label: Rounding Note
tool_args.raw_text: Totals may not add due to rounding

payload.gap_text: Totals may not add due to rounding

tool_args.label: Debt Service Expense Actual YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Debt Service expenses were $2,631.4 million, which was $23.9 million or 0.9% favorable

tool_args.label: Reimbursable Variance Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Reimbursable revenue and expense activity are primarily influenced by the nature and timing of project activity. Accordingly, variances reflect the impact of the aforementioned influences as well as changes in reimbursement and vacancy assumptions, refinements to project scheduling, as well as project delays/accelerations.

payload.claim_text: Reimbursable revenue and expense activity are primarily influenced by the nature and timing of project activity. Variances reflect changes in reimbursement and vacancy assumptions, refinements to project scheduling, as well as project delays/accelerations.
payload.subject: MTA Reimbursable Revenue & Expense

tool_args.label: Capital & Other Reimbursements Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Capital & Other Reimbursements R (66.6) (3.1) Unfavorable variances: ($35.9M) at MNR, ($28.0M) at MTA HQ, ($12.8M) at MTAC&D, ($3.0M) at MTA Bus. Favorable variances: $8.7M at NYCT, $2.8M at B&T and $1.3M at SIR.

payload.claim_text: Capital and Other Reimbursements (Reimbursable) was unfavorable by ($66.6M) or (3.1%) for December 2023 YTD. Unfavorable variances at MNR ($35.9M), MTA HQ ($28.0M), MTAC&D ($12.8M), MTA Bus ($3.0M). Favorable variances at NYCT ($8.7M), B&T ($2.8M), SIR ($1.3M).
payload.subject: MTA Capital & Other Reimbursements YTD December 2023
